name: Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells hardware and integrated solutions in China. The company's principal products include electro-acoustic products, hair care products, smart wearables, wireless modules, and metal cosmetic parts for mobile devices. It also offers speakers, such as multimedia 2.1, wireless audio, TV, bookshelf, USB, and trolley speakers; in-ear and Bluetooth headphones; and audio accessories. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Baoan Fenda Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. in 2010. Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
